raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.3": 4,
    "R1.4": 2,
    "R1.7": 4,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 3,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 1
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.",
    "R1.4": "Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta could be improved.",
    "R1.7": "Audits every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (the mention of Park et al., 2025; Yamamoto et al., 2025).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (fabricated or badly misattributed citation).",
    "RX.5": "Output blends sources without traceability."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.3": 0.9,
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 0.8,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: Audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.R1.4: Names one prior work and articulates the delta but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta could be improved.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (the mention of Park et al., 2025; Yamamoto et al., 2025).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (fabricated or badly misattributed citation).
